data.label: Ascend CANN
data.description: CANN（Compute Architecture for Neural Networks）是华为针对 AI 场景推出的异构计算架构，对上支持多种 AI 框架，对下服务 AI 处理器与编程，发挥承上启下的关键作用，是提升昇腾 AI 处理器计算效率的关键平台。

data.label: Ascend CANN
data.description: CANN (Compute Architecture for Neural Networks) is a heterogeneous computing architecture introduced by Huawei for AI scenarios. It supports multiple AI frameworks at the upper layer and serves AI processors and programming at the lower layer, playing a key bridging role. It is a critical platform for improving the computing efficiency of Ascend AI processors.
